title: nepeta nepetella subsp. laciniata
intro: Nepeta nepetella subsp. laciniata, also known as catmint or white catmint, is a subspecies of the Nepeta nepetella plant, a member of the mint family. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Nepeta nepetella subsp. laciniata include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antiseptic and antispasmodic properties. Nepeta nepetella subsp. laciniata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
